rationale.R1.5: The agent suggests structural improvements but doesn't propose a full section plan.
rationale.RX.1: Flags some uncertainties but not all recommendations are marked with confidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content and identifies issues in original text.
rationale.RX.5: Changes aren't traced to sources or reasons.
